description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 12 hrs 11 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 39 mins. His work was mostly in Java (64%), with Markdown (22%) and other languages making up the rest. The activity data shows 4 projects, but no public repository names were listed.
